recipe_1.name: Navane Uppitu
recipe_1.description: Traditional breakfast dish made with roasted Navane flour. Soft, fluffy, and delicious!
instructions: Roast the Navane flour in a dry pan for 2-3 minutes
Heat ghee in another pan, sauté finely chopped onions and green chilies
Add the roasted flour and mix well
Gradually add water while stirring to avoid lumps
Cook on medium heat for 8-10 minutes until done
Serve hot with a pat of ghee on top
recipe_1.nutritionInfo: High in fiber, minerals, and antioxidants. 100g provides 350 kcal
recipe_1.healthBenefits: Aids digestion, lowers cholesterol, rich in antioxidants
recipe_1.tips: Use pure ghee for authentic taste. Don't overcook to maintain texture

recipe_2.name: Sajje Ambali
recipe_2.description: Cooling fermented drink perfect for hot summer days. Probiotic-rich and refreshing!
instructions: Make a smooth paste of Sajje flour with 1 cup water
Let it ferment for 6-8 hours in warm place
Add yogurt to the fermented mixture
Add remaining 3 cups of water and cumin seeds
Add salt and ice, serve chilled
recipe_2.nutritionInfo: Probiotic rich, aids gut health. 200ml provides 45 kcal
recipe_2.healthBenefits: Improves digestion, cooling effect, good for lactose intolerant people
recipe_2.tips: Ferment in warm place for best results. Consume fresh for maximum probiotics

recipe_3.name: Baragu Roti
recipe_3.description: Nutritious flatbread made with finger millet. Rich in calcium and perfect with any curry!
instructions: Mix Baragu flour with salt and oil
Add warm water gradually to form soft dough
Divide into 6-8 balls and let rest for 10 minutes
Roll each ball into thin roti
Cook on hot griddle/tawa until brown spots appear
recipe_3.nutritionInfo: Highest calcium content among millets. One roti provides 50mg calcium
recipe_3.healthBenefits: Strengthens bones, aids muscle development, good for children
recipe_3.tips: Keep dough covered while making rotis. Don't make too thick

health_1.title: Why Navane is Good for Diabetics
health_1.description: Navane (Foxtail millet) is an excellent choice for people with diabetes due to its low glycemic index and high fiber content. It helps in maintaining stable blood sugar levels.
benefits: Low Glycemic Index (GI) prevents blood sugar spikes
High fiber content aids in glucose regulation
Rich in antioxidants that protect beta cells
Contains essential minerals like manganese for metabolism
scientificFacts: Navane has GI of only 54 (compared to white rice's 73)
100g of Navane provides 6.7g of fiber - crucial for diabetic management
Contains phenolic compounds that improve insulin sensitivity
Research shows 50% reduction in blood sugar spike with Navane vs rice

health_2.title: Baragu - A Superfood for Strong Bones
health_2.description: Baragu (Finger millet) is the richest plant source of calcium among cereals. It's particularly beneficial for children, women, and elderly people.
benefits: Highest calcium content among millets (344mg per 100g)
Rich in phosphorus for bone metabolism
Beneficial for children's growth and development
Contains magnesium for bone mineral density
scientificFacts: Contains 10x more calcium than rice or wheat
Bioavailable calcium is better absorbed compared to fortified milk
Provides all essential amino acids for bone protein formation
Studies show improved bone density in women consuming Baragu regularly

health_3.title: Sajje - Climate Champion & Nutrition Hero
health_3.description: Sajje (Pearl millet) is not only nutritious but also climate-resilient. It requires 70% less water than paddy, making it perfect for sustainable agriculture.
benefits: Climate resilient - thrives in drought conditions
Complete protein source for vegetarians (11g per 100g)
High in magnesium for heart health
Low carbohydrate option for weight management
scientificFacts: 100g Sajje provides 11g of complete plant protein
Rich in magnesium (important for 300+ enzyme reactions in body)
Contains tryptophan precursor for serotonin production

fpo_1.name: Davangere Millet Farmers Cooperative
fpo_1.description: Established cooperative of 500+ millet farmers dedicated to quality production and fair trade practices.

fpo_2.name: Bengaluru Urban Farming Network
fpo_2.description: Urban FPO promoting sustainable millet farming in and around Bengaluru with agro-ecological practices.

fpo_3.name: Mysore Millet Heritage
fpo_3.description: Traditional farmers preserving ancient millet varieties with heritage cultivation methods and biodiversity conservation.
